@agent-directive: ui-design-brief

> No design brief yet — producing one now. The brief locks layout, components, states, microcopy, and a11y before any code is written.
> 1. Continue — produce the brief from audit findings
> 2. Abort — drop this UI request
> Input: Tighten the spacing on the customer onboarding wizard.
> Design brief is ready. Summary:
> - Components: 1
> - States covered: 5
> - Microcopy entries (locked): 4
> 1. Confirm — lock this brief and advance to apply
> 2. Revise — send feedback; loops back to ui-design-brief
> 3. Abort — drop this UI request

**Recommendation: 1 — Confirm** — the brief covers all required slots and microcopy is final. Caveat: flip to 2 only if a string, state, or component is wrong; do not confirm strings you have not read.
@agent-directive: ui-apply-plain
> Stack: `plain`. Implementing the locked design brief.
> Microcopy is locked — every button label, empty-state message, and validation message must come verbatim from `state.ui_design.microcopy`.
> 1. Continue — implement the brief and write a `ui_apply` envelope back into state.ticket (rendered: {path: text}, files: [...])
> 2. Abort — drop this UI request
@agent-directive: ui-design-review-plain
> Stack: `plain`. Reviewing rendered components against the locked design brief.
> The review pass compares `state.ticket.ui_apply.rendered` against `state.ui_design` (microcopy, states, a11y, layout) and produces a structured `findings` list.
> 1. Continue — run the review and write `{findings: [...], review_clean: bool}` into `state.ui_review`
> 2. Abort — drop this UI request
@agent-directive: ui-polish-plain
> Stack: `plain`. Polish round 1 of 2.
> 1 finding(s) from `state.ui_review`. Apply each fix, re-run the review, and write the refreshed envelope back.
> 1. Continue — apply fixes, re-review, and increment `state.ui_polish.rounds`
> 2. Abort — drop this UI request
@agent-directive: ui-polish-plain
> Stack: `plain`. Polish round 2 of 2.
> 1 finding(s) from `state.ui_review`. Apply each fix, re-run the review, and write the refreshed envelope back.
> 1. Continue — apply fixes, re-review, and increment `state.ui_polish.rounds`
> 2. Abort — drop this UI request
> Stack: `plain`. Polish ceiling reached (2/2 rounds).
> 1 finding(s) still open in `state.ui_review`. The engine refuses a third round.
> 1. Ship as-is — mark `state.ui_review.review_clean = True` and continue to `report` (the open findings stay in the delivery report)
> 2. Abort — drop this UI request
> 3. Hand off — a human picks up the remaining findings outside the engine; re-invoke `/work` only after they are resolved
**Recommendation: 3 — Hand off** — two automated rounds failed to converge. Caveat: pick 1 only when the remaining findings are explicitly acceptable (low-priority polish, deferred to a follow-up).
